text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
One day, I spot the lively trio again<n>while I'm out
shopping.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hair ties, hair ties! ♪ Cool, cute, and<n>stretchy to
boot! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: I hope there are a ton of cute ones to<n>pick from! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
So this article says cute hair starts<n>with a cute tie,
huh. Being stylish<n>sounds like a ton of work.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
You can't be a real grown-up without<n>keeping up
with the latest trends. ♪<n>That's just how it works!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
Wait, I'm feeling some deja vu here...<n>Didn't we
already have a<n>conversation like this?

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Uh-huh! Wasn't it about pins?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Hair ties are where it's at now!<n>C'mon, get with
the times! ♪

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Get with the tiiimes! ♪

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
We said we'd get matching pins, but<n>did we
actually?

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Um... We did look for some...

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: But they didn't have much of a<n>selection.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Plus, the shops here are close to<n>school, so we'd
just end up with the<n>same ones everyone else
has.

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text:
So we ventured into the fashionable<n>grown-up
side of town to find the<n>hottest stuff!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
The streets were full of stylish<n>grown-up ladies, all
shiny and<n>glamorous!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
And all the shops had so many<n>zeroes on their
price tags!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Sooo... we left empty-handed and sad.

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
But, we did have those super-trendy<n>desserts as
a little treat.

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Yeah, we totally did! Those desserts<n>were tasty!
I'm gonna try making<n>them myself sometime! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text: Bono! Today, it's dress over<n>desserts!

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
This will be the day we finally buy the<n>trendiest
item around—hair ties!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Ehehe! ♪ You can do it, Maya! ♪

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
I said "we," Bono! That means all of<n>us! Right,
Curren?

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan
text_block_list.text: Yeah, totally! ♪ Let's all become style<n>savvy! ☆

text_block_list.name: Mayano Top Gun
text_block_list.text:
Okey-dokey! Let's race our way to<n>the top of the
trends!

text_block_list.name: Curren Chan and Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Yeah! ♪

text_block_list.name: Monólogo
text_block_list.text:
Mayano Top Gun's drive to keep up<n>with the
latest tricks and tips could<n>also help her running...
maybe.
